_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Amadeus
listings.description: Amadeus operates one of the world's largest global distribution systems, aggregating airline fares and availability from hundreds of carriers for travel agencies, OTAs, and corporate booking tools. It also offers NDC-based content aggregation alongside traditional GDS fares.

listings.name: Sabre
listings.description: Sabre is a major global distribution system connecting travel agencies and online sellers to airline fares, schedules, and availability worldwide. It provides both traditional GDS content and NDC-enabled offers through its Sabre Travel Network.

listings.name: Travelport
listings.description: Travelport is a global travel distribution platform that aggregates airline, hotel, and car content for travel agencies and online sellers through its Travelport+ marketplace. It offers rich content and NDC integration to modernize traditional GDS booking flows.

listings.name: Duffel
listings.description: Duffel is a modern API-first flight booking platform that aggregates airline content, including NDC and traditional fares, for OTAs, travel startups, and corporate travel tools. It positions itself as a developer-friendly alternative to legacy GDS integrations.
usps: Fast integration compared to legacy GDS

listings.name: Kiwi.com Tequila API
listings.description: Tequila is Kiwi.com's B2B flight search and booking API that aggregates fares across full-service and low-cost carriers, including virtual interlining between airlines without formal agreements. It is used by OTAs and travel apps to power flight search.

listings.name: Mystifly
listings.description: Mystifly is a B2B air ticketing consolidator and API aggregator serving travel agencies and OTAs across Asia, the Middle East, and beyond, offering fare aggregation across hundreds of airlines. It emphasizes reach into emerging market carriers.

listings.name: TravelFusion
listings.description: TravelFusion is a flight content aggregator specializing in connecting low-cost and hybrid carriers to travel agencies and OTAs that traditionally lack GDS distribution. It provides direct-connect API access to LCC content globally.

listings.name: Verteil Technologies
listings.description: Verteil Technologies is an NDC-focused flight aggregation platform that connects travel sellers to airline offers via modern NDC APIs, aiming to simplify integration for OTAs and travel management companies. It positions itself as an NDC aggregator bridging multiple airline connections.

listings.name: Farelogix (Accelya)
listings.description: Farelogix, acquired by Accelya, provides airline merchandising and NDC distribution technology that lets carriers offer direct-connect content to travel agencies and aggregators, bypassing traditional GDS fees. It was an early mover in NDC-based offer management.
usps: NDC pioneer with major airline adoptions
Reduces GDS distribution costs for airlines
Now part of Accelya's airline retailing suite

listings.name: Aerticket
listings.description: Aerticket is a German flight consolidator and B2B fare aggregator providing travel agencies with net fares and ticketing across a wide network of airlines. It operates in multiple European markets with localized agency support.

listings.name: Volaris Group Travel Technologies
listings.description: Volaris Group (part of Constellation Software) owns a portfolio of travel technology companies serving airline distribution, reservation, and reservation-adjacent software niches. Its holdings include specialized travel software vendors serving airlines and tour operators.
usps: Long-term stable ownership for niche vendors

listings.name: Dohop
listings.description: Dohop is an Icelandic flight connection technology company enabling virtual interlining between airlines that don't have formal partnerships, powering self-connect booking widgets for airports and carriers. It aggregates schedules and fares to create combinable itineraries.

listings.name: WorldTicket
listings.description: WorldTicket is a Denmark-based airline reservation and e-commerce technology provider serving small and regional carriers with booking, ticketing, and ancillary sales systems. It focuses on cost-efficient reservation systems for smaller airlines.

listings.name: Travelport JourneyView Merchandising
listings.description: Travelport JourneyView is a shopping display product within the Travelport ecosystem that presents rich airline offer content, including branded fares and ancillaries, to travel agents in a modernized interface. It aims to make GDS shopping visually competitive with OTA storefronts.
usps: Bridges legacy EDIFACT and modern NDC

listings.name: FlightsLogic
listings.description: FlightsLogic provides flight booking API aggregation and white-label travel portal solutions for travel agencies and tour operators, integrating multiple GDS and LCC sources into a single interface. It targets small to mid-sized travel businesses seeking turnkey booking technology.
usps: Turnkey solution for smaller travel agencies
